character.name:
TRUE pixel art with OCTOPATH TRAVELER character sprite color 
palette and pixel detail level (HD-2D 16-bit JRPG style). 
STRICT FRONT-FACING POSE for 8-direction rotation.

POSE:
- SOUTH-FACING base sprite, body squared toward viewer
- Both shoulders parallel, head straight forward
- Imposing armored stance, slightly menacing

PROPORTIONS:
- Tall imposing humanoid, ~7-head ratio with broader shoulders 
  than player (1.2x scale)
- Heavy armored silhouette

FACE — HORNED HELMET MINIMALIST:
- Full black HORNED HELMET covering the face
- Eyes are GLOWING DIM CRIMSON SLITS visible through the helmet 
  visor (horizontal slits, not pinpricks)
- NO mouth, NO nose — helmet covers everything
- Two short horns curve back from helmet sides

HAIR:
- Hidden under helmet, no visible hair

BODY AND EQUIPMENT:
- Heavy BLACKENED PLATE ARMOR with DIM CRIMSON RUNIC GLOW along 
  the seams (chest, pauldrons, gauntlets, boots)
- Tattered DARK BURGUNDY CAPE attached at both shoulders, falling 
  to the knees, jagged edges
- Wielding an EXECUTIONER'S GREATAXE in BOTH HANDS held vertically 
  in front of the body (axe head visible above the chest, blade 
  facing camera, tip pointing down but NOT touching the ground)
- Heavy plated boots with crimson rune accents

COLOR PALETTE:
- Dim crimson rune glow and eye slits are the saturated accents
- Limited palette ~18 colors of charcoal, blackened steel, 
  dark burgundy, dim crimson

RENDERING STYLE:
- Single black outline, no anti-aliasing, sharp pixel edges
- Basic flat shading, NO smooth gradients

CLEAN OUTPUT — STRICT:
★ CLEAN SOLID COLOR SHAPES ONLY
★ Crimson rune glow is deliberate clean pattern (not random)
★ NO random white specks, NO sparkles
★ TRUE transparent PNG (alpha=0)
★ NO shadow on the ground
